note: Image 15_13_0.jpeg clearly shows a BRIDGE (mist) — elevated deck with side barriers, person waving on right, white car in right lane. PDR 15.9(v) prohibits stopping 'na estakadakh, mostakh, shlyakhoprovodakh i pid nymy, a takozh u tunelyakh' UNCONDITIONALLY (no passenger-pickup exception, no lane-count condition). So stopping for passenger pickup on the bridge is forbidden -> option 1 'Zaboroneno.' Our stored answer 3 ('Dozvoleno v bud-yakomu vypadku') is wrong; option 2 (5 min) also wrong. Corroborated by pdr-online.com.ua marking 'Zaboroneno' correct and by alt_read=1. Note: local import_plan.json said answer 3 — contradicted by official rule + image.
